mdSummary:
# DensityScope

Density Scope component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/density-scope

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| DensityScope | Value | `Lumeo.Density` | `Lumeo.Density.Comfortable` | The density cascaded to every density-aware descendant. Default Comfortable. |
| DensityScope | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The subtree that receives the cascaded density. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (DensityScope) — The subtree that receives the cascaded density.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<DensityScope />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/DensityScope/DensityScope.razor`
